Name: Bin Name
Definition: Average longitude of all structures in the county
Formula: CEILING((Bin Number -1) * [Square Footage Bin Size])/1000 & " k - " & FLOOR(Bin Number * [Square Footage Bin Size])/1000
Use Case: Name groups of data for distributions

Name: Bin Number
Definition: The group a structure number is placed in based on Square Footage

Name: Structure Number
Example: Must be 6 digits with leading zeros
